name: go_workspace
description: Describe the Go workspace at the given root: whether it is a module, a multi-module workspace (go.work), or a GOPATH project, and the modules it contains.

name: go_search
description: Fuzzy-search the workspace for Go symbols (types, functions, variables, methods). Useful when you don't know the exact name or location.

name: go_file_context
description: Summarize the declarations from other files in the same package that are referenced by the given Go file. Run this immediately after reading any Go file for the first time.

file.description: Absolute path to a .go file inside the mounted workspace

name: go_package_api
description: Return the public API of one or more Go packages: exported types, functions, methods, variables, and constants with their signatures and doc comments.

name: go_symbol_references
description: Find all references to a symbol declared at the given file. Use before modifying a symbol's definition to understand the blast radius.

file.description: Absolute path to the .go file declaring the symbol

symbol.description: Symbol name, optionally qualified by receiver type (e.g. 'Server.Run')

name: go_diagnostics
description: Report build and analysis diagnostics (errors, warnings, hints) for the given files, including any quick-fix diffs gopls can suggest.

files.description: Absolute paths of .go files to check

name: go_vulncheck
description: Run govulncheck against a package pattern (e.g. './...') and report known vulnerabilities affecting symbols actually reachable from the workspace.
